title: orthiopteris minor
intro: Orthiopteris minor is a species of fern native to Australia, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various herbal remedies, and research has shown that it possesses antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, making it a potential candidate for wound healing and anti-inflammatory treatments. The health benefits of Orthiopteris minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and potentially even exhibit antiviral activity. Herbal preparations of Orthiopteris minor can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a salve or cream to apply topically.
